testcase.name: test_non_string_presets_dropped

failure.message: AssertionError: status 422: {"detail":[{"type":"string_type","loc":["body","presets",1],"msg":"Input should be a valid string","input":42,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/v/string_type"},{"type":"string_type","loc":["body assert 422 == 200 + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_phase2_new_endpoints.py:237: in test_non_string_presets_dropped assert r.status_code == 200, f"status {r.status_code}: {r.text[:200]}" E AssertionError: status 422: {"detail":[{"type":"string_type","loc":["body","presets",1],"msg":"Input should be a valid string","input":42,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/v/string_type"},{"type":"string_type","loc":["body E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_generic_og_png

failure.message:
AssertionError: cache-control: 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate' assert 'no-store, no...st-revalidate' == 'public, max-...s-maxage=3600'
- public, max-age=3600, s-maxage=3600 + no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_phase2_new_endpoints.py:292: in test_generic_og_png assert cc == "public, max-age=3600, s-maxage=3600", f"cache-control: {cc!r}" E AssertionError: cache-control: 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate' E assert 'no-store, no...st-revalidate' == 'public, max-...s-maxage=3600' E E - public, max-age=3600, s-maxage=3600 E + no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate

testcase.name: test_personalized_og_png

failure.message:
AssertionError: assert 'no-store, no...st-revalidate' == 'public, max-...s-maxage=3600'
- public, max-age=3600, s-maxage=3600 + no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_phase2_new_endpoints.py:300: in test_personalized_og_png assert cc == "public, max-age=3600, s-maxage=3600" E AssertionError: assert 'no-store, no...st-revalidate' == 'public, max-...s-maxage=3600' E E - public, max-age=3600, s-maxage=3600 E + no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate
